title: Graduate School of Health Sciences Main Principles
content:
Graduate School of Health Sciences Main Principles

Mission

In order to respond to the developing health needs of the society;

To provide non-formal learning environments with its expert academic staff, laboratories and research centers,

To train experts and scientists who are compatible with R&D focuses, adhere to ethical values, creative, universal, and can direct health and science policies.

Vision

To be a respected and preferred education and research institution in cooperation with national and international graduate-schools.

Foundation and Purpose

The Graduate School of Health Sciences was established in 2011, and firstly students were admitted to the Hospital Management and Neuroscience Master's programs in the 2012-2013 academic year.

Our graduate-school aims to train respected, creative and universal scientists and experts who are competent in their fields by using the experience and knowledge of our university in the fields of behavioral and health sciences with its distinguished teaching staff.
